zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall於大約1348年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾金萊特時，她的父親Sir Brian Cornwall MP20歲，母親Matilda Strange16歲。她於大約1383年4月與Sir John Blount II, of Sodington在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1424年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾索丁頓享年77歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾金萊特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall于大约1348年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾金萊特时，她的父亲Sir Brian Cornwall MP20岁，母亲Matilda Strange16岁。她于大约1383年4月与Sir John Blount II, of Sodington在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1424年在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾索丁頓享年77岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾金萊特。

nameMeanings.name: Cornwall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the county of Cornwall, which is named with the Old English tribal name Cornwealas. This is from Kernow (the term that the Cornish used to refer to themselves, a word of uncertain etymology, perhaps connected with a Celtic element meaning ‘horn, headland’), + Old English wealas ‘strangers, foreigners’, the term used by the Anglo-Saxons for British-speaking people.

variants.name: Cornwell
meanings: habitational name from Cornwell in Oxfordshire, named from Old English corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + well(a) ‘spring, stream’.

variant of Cornwall or Cornhill; in southeastern England mainly a habitational name from Cornhill in London but elsewhere alternatively from Cornhill (Northumberland) or one of the many minor places so called, often becoming Cornell .

variants.name: Corney
meanings: habitational name from Corney in Cumbria or Corney in Hertfordshire (now known as Corneybury), from Old English corn ‘grain’ or corn, a metathesized form of cron, cran ‘crane’ + ēg ‘island’. It seems possible, from the distribution of early forms, that it may also derive from a lost place in Lancashire. Alternatively, a habitational name from Corney (Lancashire), later named Corneyrow, now Corner Row or Cornoe in Greenhalgh (alias Greenall), in the parish of Kirkham. Corney was sometimes pronounced and spelled Cornah, Corner, Cornall, Gorney, and Gornall.
perhaps a shortened form of   Cornwall   or   Cornish  , or a metathesized form of   Croney  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

nameMeanings.name: "Isabel"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell

The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall was born about 1348, in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Brian Cornwall MP, was 20 and her mother, Matilda Strange, was 16. She married Sir John Blount II, of Sodington about April 1383, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1424, in Sodington, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in Kinlet, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall est née environ 1348, à Kinlet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Brian Cornwall MP, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Matilda Strange, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Blount II, of Sodington environ avril 1383, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1424, à Sodington, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Kinlet, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall um 1348 in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Brian Cornwall MP 20 und ihre Mutter Matilda Strange 16. Sie hat um April 1383 in England Sir John Blount II, of Sodington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1424 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Sodington, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kinlet, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall è nata il circa 1348 nel Kinlet, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Brian Cornwall MP, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Matilda Strange, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Blount II, of Sodington circa aprile 1383, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1424, nel Sodington, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Kinlet, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella "Isabel" Cornwallが約1348年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアキンレットで生まれた時，父Sir Brian Cornwall MPは20歳，母Matilda Strangeは16歳であった。約1383年4月にイギリスでSir John Blount II, of Sodingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1424年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアソディントンで77歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアキンレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall(이)가 대략 1348년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 킨렛에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Brian Cornwall MP(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Strange(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1383년 4월 영국에서 Sir John Blount II, of Sodington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 소딩턴에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 킨렛에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall nasceu aproximadamente 1348, em Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Brian Cornwall MP, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Strange, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Blount II, of Sodington aproximadamente abril de 1383, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1424, em Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall родилась около 1348 г. в местности кинлет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Brian Cornwall MP было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Strange, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Blount II, of Sodington около апрель 1383 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1424 г. в местности содингтон, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности кинлет, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella "Isabel" Cornwall nació aproximadamente 1348, en Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Brian Cornwall MP, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Matilda Strange, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Sir John Blount II, of Sodington aproximadamente abril de 1383, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1424, en Sodington, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
